" Welcome to use Amap’s team travel feature! While sharing a wonderful journey with friends, Amap reminds you to pay special attention to:
1.\tWhile using this feature, your location will be shared in real-time with others during the team formation period. Please decide carefully before using it.
2.\tWhen using this feature, comply with national laws, regulations, and social norms. Amap reserves the right to report any violations to the police or relevant authorities and provide information.
3.\tNetwork traffic fees will apply during the service use. The fees are charged by your telecom provider. Contact them for details.
4.\tThis feature is a free service. It is not authorized for profit, charge, or other revenue-generating uses, and it is not responsible for any resulting losses.
5.\tDue to signal or network reasons, the location service may not achieve the expected effect. Don’t rely solely on it and use actual situations for reference.
6.\tAmap reserves the right to take all legal remedies for improper actions violating laws.
7.\tFor any other details, please refer to Amap’s service terms and privacy policy. "

"Thank you for using the AMAP Bus and Subway Navigation Service! To help you better understand and exercise your personal rights and entitlements, and to ensure AMAP becomes a trusted mapping and navigation product for you, AMAP will introduce the handling of some personal information and usage notice related to AMAP Bus and Subway Navigation Service. Please trust that AMAP will process your personal information in accordance with legal, legitimate, necessary, and integrity principles. [Location Information] When you turn on your device location permissions and start using the positioning services provided by AMAP, AMAP will achieve positioning through various methods, including IP addresses, satellite signals, and other sensors capable of providing relevant information (such as nearby devices, WLAN Access Point, and base station, which will provide AMAP with information required for positioning).In providing navigation services such as positioning and getting-off reminder, AMAP will collect your dynamic location information. Once you start traveling following an AMAP-planned route, to keep you updated of transfer and arrival information with regard to buses and subways and provide you with getting-off and transfer reminders, the Bus and Subway Navigation Service function will be initiated. You may terminate the ongoing navigation by clicking Navigation in progress button. You may also prohibit automatic activation of the Bus and Subway function through current route settings or via My - Settings - Navigation Settings - Bus. [Usage Notice] ●Please use this software only when it is safe to do so, in case of traffic accidents or other dangerous situations that may lead to unnecessary losses. ●You understand and agree that, although AMAP dedicates to continuously and quickly update mapping data and provide better services, there could be circumstances where the mapping data is inconsistent with the reality, as the result of the ongoing changes of the reality, limitations of technology, equipment, and network, as well as other factors AMAP cannot reasonably foresee, control, or overcome. Therefore, the getting-off or transfer reminders may not be completely in time or accurate, and AMAP does not guarantee the accuracy, timeliness, and completeness of the mapping data and related services. To ensure your safety, the route planning and navigation functions, as well as other functions and services provided are for reference only. Please pay close attention to stop announcements while taking a bus or subway, and pay attention to the station sign information when transferring. ●Using the Navigation Service function may generate fees for network data, which will be charged by your telecommunication service provider. Please consult relevant providers for charging standards. ●AMAP is not responsible for any losses arising from violations of laws and regulations, or the above-mentioned notice, unless specified by laws and regulations. ●Before using AMAP Bus and Subway Navigation Service, please carefully read and fully understand the AMAP Terms of Service and AMAP Privacy Policy. Should you have any questions, please contact AMAP Customer Service for further explanation before starting to use AMAP Bus and Subway Navigation Service. AMAP will be pleasant to provide further explanations, if needed. Your understanding and approval of this notice suggest that you agree to be bound by all the contents of terms with regard to the usage of the Bus and Subway Navigation Service provided by AMAP."

"Thank you for using Amap Cycling!
To help you better understand and exercise your personal rights, Amap provides information on the handling of personal data related to Amap Cycling services and usage tips. Please trust that Amap will handle your personal info based on principles of legality, justification, necessity, and integrity.
[Location Info] When you enable device location permissions and start using Amap Cycling, Amap will collect your dynamic location data. To help you understand your cycling activity with Amap, you authorize Amap to compile statistics on your dynamic location and present the results based on Amap Cycling.
[Usage Tips] - Do not operate this software while cycling. Use it safely to avoid accidents or dangers. - Using the cycling feature may incur data charges by your telecom provider. Check their rates. - If riding an e-bike, comply with local e-bike traffic regulations. - Amap is not liable for any losses from legal violations or the above tips unless explicitly stated by law. - Before using Amap Cycling, read and understand the 'Amap Service Terms' and 'Amap Privacy Policy'. If you have questions, contact Amap support for clarification before starting. By understanding and agreeing to this notice, you accept all terms and can use Amap Cycling services. "

"Thank you for using Amap Walking Exercise!
To better help you understand and exercise your personal rights, Amap will explain the handling of some personal info related to Amap Walking Exercise services and provide usage tips. Trust that Amap will process your personal info legally, properly, necessarily, and honestly.
[Location Info] When you enable location permissions on your device and start using Amap Walking Exercise services, Amap will collect your dynamic location info. To help you understand your exercise status using Amap, you authorize Amap to statistically calculate your dynamic location info and step count info, and present the statistical results based on Amap Exercise.
[Usage Tips] ● Do not operate this software while walking; ensure safety to avoid traffic accidents or other dangers. ● Using the walking exercise feature may incur data charges, collected by your telecom provider. Please check their specific rates. ● If you violate laws, regulations, or the above tips, Amap is not liable for any resulting losses except as clearly stipulated by laws and regulations. ● Before using Amap Walking Exercise, carefully read and fully understand the Amap Terms of Service and Amap Privacy Policy. If you have questions, consult Amap customer service for further explanation. Once you understand and agree to these tips, you are bound by all terms and can use Amap Walking Exercise services. "

"Railway crossing ahead@slow down; Railway ahead@take it slow, don't race the train; We're not guerrillas@don't argue with the railway here"
"Speed camera ahead@small fine, big safety; Speed camera ahead@control speed and stay calm; Speed camera ahead@not slowing down, who you trying to be? "
" Service area ahead@stretch your legs, relax; Almost at the service area@buy a little gift, surprise her; Service area ahead@give the car a break, let it rest "

" Thank you for using the AMAP Cycling Navigation Service! To help you better understand and exercise your personal rights and interests, and to ensure AMAP provides you with reliable mapping and navigation product, AMAP hereby provides information about the handling of personal information with regard to AMAP Cycling Navigation Service, as well as the usage notice for such services. Please understand that AMAP shall process your personal information in accordance with the principles of legality, legitimacy, necessity and integrity. [Location Information] When you turn on your device location permissions and start using the positioning services provided by AMAP, AMAP will achieve positioning through various methods, including IP addresses, satellite signals, and other sensors capable of providing relevant information (such as nearby devices, WLAN Access Point, and base station, which will provide AMAP with information required for positioning).In providing navigation services such as positioning and route calculation, AMAP will collect your dynamic location information. To help you understand your movement when using AMAP, you authorize AMAP to conduct statistical calculations on your dynamic location information and display the results to you through AMAP Sport. [Usage Notice] ●Please do not operate this software while cycling, and please use relevant functions only when it is safe to do so, in case of traffic accidents or other dangerous situations. ●You understand and agree that, although AMAP dedicates to continuously and quickly update mapping data and provide better services, there could be circumstances where the mapping data is inconsistent with, and thus cannot properly reflect, the reality, as the result of the ongoing changes of the reality, limitations of technology, equipment, and network, as well as other factors AMAP cannot reasonably foresee, control, or overcome. AMAP does not guarantee the accuracy, timeliness, and completeness of the mapping data and related services. Therefore, to ensure your safety, the route planning, the various navigation functions (including but not limited to road types, shaded areas, slopes, street lights, and other road sections and their proportions, etc., and pedestrian and traffic flow related recommendations), AMAP Sport, as well as other functions and services provided are for reference only. Please do not rely solely on AMAP services for your travel decisions, and AMAP does not guarantee the effectiveness of relevant functions. Please always consider actual road and traffic conditions, and abide by traffic laws and regulations. AMAP is not responsible for any accidents, penalties, or losses caused by not considering real road and traffic conditions or following traffic laws and regulations, unless specified by law and regulations. ●When using the navigation to record your trip, or other functions mentioned under this usage notice, you shall comply with applicable laws and regulations, regulatory provisions, industry rules, public order and good customs. " Dear Users: Thank you for using AMAP Pedestrian Navigation Service, including light navigation (path-finding), AR-based live navigation (smart navigation), and pedestrian navigation scenarios. When you use AR-based live navigation (smart navigation) service, AMAP can identify the environment and objects of the physical world and provide virtual visualized navigation service for you by collecting dynamic location information and images, thereby providing better navigation experience. To help you understand your movement when using AMAP, you authorize AMAP to conduct statistical calculations on your dynamic location information and display the results to you through AMAP Sport. Please read this notice carefully before agreeing/accepting this notice. We will not remind you repeatedly after you have read and accepted this notice, in order to ensure good usage experience. You acknowledge that your agreement/acceptance to this notice made during your initial usage of the Pedestrian Navigation Service can be retrospective. Your agreement/acceptance also suggests that you clearly understand the content of this notice.
Device Permission and Information ●When providing you with directional information, the pedestrian navigation function requires your navigation-related device permissions, and where necessary, access to relevant information in order to provide you with fundamental services. The pedestrian navigation function requires the following device permissions, to the extent necessary to achieve relevant functions: location, storage, camera, etc. If you have already granted AMAP the above permissions, you will not receive further reminder for device permission requests. ●When you turn on your device location permissions and start using the positioning services provided by AMAP, AMAP will achieve positioning through various methods, including IP addresses, satellite signals, and other sensors capable of providing relevant information (such as nearby devices, WLAN Access Point, and base station, which will provide AMAP with information required for positioning). In providing navigation services such as positioning, route calculation, and intelligent route recommendations, AMAP will collect your dynamic location information. ●The image data generated from your usage of AR-based live navigation (smart navigation) will not be stored or copied, except the images stored for the purpose of identifying the starting and ending locations when activating the AR-based live navigation (smart navigation) to identify the origin and ending locations. Important Notice and Disclaimer ●You understand and agree that, although AMAP dedicates to continuously and quickly update mapping data and provide better services, there could be circumstances where the mapping data is inconsistent with, and thus cannot properly reflect, the reality, as the result of the ongoing changes of the reality, limitations of technology, equipment, and network, as well as other factors AMAP cannot reasonably foresee, control, or overcome. AMAP does not guarantee the accuracy, timeliness, and completeness of the mapping data and related services. Therefore, to ensure your safety, the route planning, the voice guidance, the various navigation functions (including but not limited to road types, shaded areas, slopes, street lights, and other road sections and their proportions, etc., and pedestrian and traffic flow related recommendations), as well as other functions and services provided are for reference only. Please do not rely solely on AMAP services for your travel decisions. The routes provided through AR-based live navigation (smart navigation) are to support your travel decisions only, and AMAP does not guarantee the effectiveness of the function. While using this function, please always consider actual traffic conditions and follow the signals, road markers, and traffic regulations related to travel. AMAP is not responsible for any accidents, penalties, or losses caused by not considering real road conditions or following traffic laws and regulations, unless specified by law and regulations. ●When the pedestrian navigation service function provides travel directional information, you should always be aware of your personal safety and property. While operating this function, you should remain stationary and be aware of your surroundings to ensure you are in a completely safe environment. If you are in motion, you should avoid any operations to prevent any potential danger. ●Pedestrian navigation function is designed to serve individuals with full civil capacity who hold Chinese nationality. If you are under the age of 18, lack full civil capacity, or are of foreign nationality, please use pedestrian navigation service only with the guidance or accompaniment of an adult, a person with full civil capacity, or a Chinese national (hereinafter referred to as the “Accompanying Person”). While using this function, you should ensure the Accompanying Person always pays close attention to the directional information provided through the pedestrian navigation function. ●In the scenario of AR-based live navigation (smart navigation), directional information is provided through display of clear instructions on your device screen, such as “colored directional symbols.” If you experience any discomfort, you should promptly stop using the function or switch to an alternative scenario. ●When using the navigation to record your trip, or other functions mentioned under this usage notice, you shall comply with applicable laws and regulations, regulatory provisions, industry rules, public order and good customs. You shall ensure the authenticity of the content you mark, display, publish, share and disseminate, and must not mark, display, publish, share or disseminate any content that endangers national unity, sovereignty and territorial integrity, state secrets, national security, national honor and interests, ethnic relations, ethnic unity, social order, social stability, public order and good customs, or any content that implicates insults, slander, obscenity, pornography, violence, intimidation, incitement to crime, attacks, racial discrimination, harassment, falsification, impersonation, privacy leak, malicious plagiarism, infringement of the personal information of third-party or other legitimate rights and interests thereof, or any other content that violates applicable laws, regulations, administrative rules with legal or administrative effect or goes against good social customs. ●AMAP has the right to review the content you mark, display, publish, share, or disseminate. For content that does not comply with AMAP content reviewing rules, AMAP has the right to delete relevant content without your consent and issue warnings to relevant users. For those who repeatedly violate relevant rules or cause severe impacts, AMAP has the right to close their accounts. AMAP also has the right to report violations of this usage notice to the public security authorities or other authorities, along with relevant content and clues, and cooperate with the public security authorities in relevant investigations. AMAP reserves the right to take all remedial measures available by law against improper behaviors that violate laws and regulations. ●Pedestrian navigation function is free from charge. Unless otherwise specified, we will not charge any additional fees. For fees for network data generated while using this function, please consult relevant service provider. ●Pedestrian navigation function is highly interactive. Some models of mobile phones, depending on the performance of different models, may experience significant issues such as high power-consumption or overheating. You can switch the function based on your actual situation to reduce energy consumption. ●AMAP is not responsible for any accidents, losses, or incidents arising from violations of traffic regulations or the above-mentioned notice during the use of Pedestrian Navigation Service, unless specified by laws and regulations. ●Before using AMAP Pedestrian Navigation Service, please carefully read and fully understand the AMAP Terms of Service and AMAP Privacy Policy. Should you have any questions, please contact AMAP Customer Service for further explanation before starting to use AMAP Pedestrian Navigation Service. AMAP will be pleasant to provide further explanations, if needed. Your understanding and approval of this notice suggest that you agree to be bound by all the contents of terms with regard to the usage of the Pedestrian Navigation Service provided by AMAP.

Additional functions will separately seek consent for unnecessary personal info. We strive to protect your info security.
